title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Compat API: Avoid trying to create volumes if they already exist
body: Trying to mkdir when the destination exists, can create problems like it was experienced with unix sockets, avoid trying to mkdir if we already know the volume exists

comments.body: Can you add a signoff (`git commit --amend -s`) and re-push? You'll probably also need to add `[NO TESTS NEEDED]` to the title.

> Can you add a signoff (`git commit --amend -s`) and re-push? You'll probably also need to add `[NO TESTS NEEDED]` to the title.
